case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. JUAN M FRIAS

docket_entries.description: 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 18070055) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT FRIAS, JUAN M DOES 1 TO 10
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-01-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-01-2018 CONTINUED TO AUG-28-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AS TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE MAY-01-2018 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-28-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
